name: Chicken/Rice/Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Crisco oil with roasted garlic
recipeInstructions:
This recipe requires a very large pot such as a Dutch oven.
Cook the broccoli and rice separately. Set aside.
In a large pot, melt the butter and add the oil, pepper, and garlic salt.
Saute onions, mushrooms, and celery until tender, but not brown. Mix soups together and add to the onion/celery/mushroom mixture. Add 1/2 can of milk. Add cheese and mix well.
Add rice and broccoli and mix well. Top with chicken. Cover; bake at 350°F for about 1 hour or until chicken is done.
